Name: Belch
Effect: Single Target. Low Accuracy 1. Sound Move. This Move can only be used if the User has eaten a berry/food during the same Round. Pokemon with this Move may forfeit their Beauty score completely. If the Pokemon forgets this Move, restore 1 Point to their Beauty Score.
Description: The user shoots a blast of venomous pins that inject venom into the foe, this venom is specially potent against those already compromised.
